positive: A breathtaking celestial ocean scene featuring abstract cosmic waves curling around a luminous, monolithic mountain peak. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and bioluminescent fantasy, rendered with deep sapphire blues, vibrant turquoise, and glowing gold accents. Focus on a central, symmetrical composition with strong contrast and clean, repeating patterns suitable for seamless textile printing. The subject should have crisp, defined silhouettes, emanating a soft, ethereal glow against a dark, velvety background. Highly detailed, vector art feel, no gradients, minimalist yet maximalist complexity, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, grain, noise, multiple subjects, cartoon, graffiti, logo, trademark, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped
